findings.title: Browser audit captured console errors
findings.description: 1 console error(s) appeared during the browser audit.

evidence.message: http://www.iana.org/help/example-domains: The Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy header has been ignored, because the URL's origin was untrustworthy. It was defined either in the final response or a redirect. Please deliver the response using the HTTPS protocol. You can also use the 'localhost' origin instead. See https://www.w3.org/TR/powerful-features/#potentially-trustworthy-origin and https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#the-cross-origin-opener-policy-header.

findings.recommendation: Resolve runtime console errors on audited paths before demo or launch.
